name: The Last Empire | Alt History
description: In the year 1936, Asia is ready to explode into chaos, the new Asian power of Korea hungers for expansion. In the wake of the humiliation of the Opium Wars in Qing China in the 1800s, the Emperors of Korea realized one thing. If the their beloved Korea and it's people were to survive, modernization is necessary. Over the next decades, the small peninsular nation gathered it's strength, humiliating its larger neighbors. Korea eventually conquered Manchuria, Taiwan and Kyushu. With Japan weakened and China shattered, little stands in the way of the Empire of Korea. The recent rise of fascism in Germany and Italy only serves to incourage Korea to strike at the Anglo-American order. At this very moment in 1936, the Empire is ready for more...
creator: Gooberbruv
